programmes.show_description: Both Dr Emma McMullen and Dr Adil Sheraz need a wipe down after dealing with cysts, Dr Toby Nelson has a lipoma named after him, and Dr Natalia Spierings performs a mole removal.

programmes.show_name: Call the Bailiffs: Time to Pay Up!
programmes.show_description: Mark and Sam trail a debtor who owes more than £20k for an unpaid invoice - but they are wary at the address as the property has an associated firearms licence and a big dog.
Documentary series. When they respond to an alarm at a laundrette, firefighters discover several people living illegally on the premises.
The doctors treat a patient drinking too much in an effort to blot out depression, a heavy drinker with a damaged liver and an unusual case of 'swimmer's itch'.
Dr Natalia Spierings gets herself a wedding invitation after helping newly-engaged Carly with a 'secret on her back'. Dr Adil Sheraz finds a suspicious lesion on a mole patient.
The Eggheads compete against the "Seven Hills Students" in a quiz contest.

Ant returns to surprise a 96-year-old friend, Wilma's bar staff learn speed-mixing, and John and Jamie's chip shop rivalry hits the mini Olympics in sunny Spain.
In Newton Abbot, one of the most prolific shoplifters in town is spotted huddled in a doorway, and in Liverpool, security officers foil an attempt at a dodgy supermarket sweep. (Ep20)
Traffic Cops from North and West Yorkshire hunt down disqualified, unlicenced and uninsured drivers.
Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston. The police have their hands full with the machinations of forgers, fakers and takers.

A father receives a reprimand for dangerous driving on the school run and a wanted man using a false identity is apprehended.

Tane's world is turned upside down. Can Jo really trust her new boyfriend? Cash fears for his friend.
Documentary series. This special revisits three memorable consultations with the elderly from the first three series, with patients telling their own stories.
A new rule that ambulance crews must hand over patients within 45 minutes creates extra pressure. And paramedics bring in 67-year-old Dianne, with suspected sepsis.
When Duncan is admitted to Royal Stoke emergency department after falling down a full flight of stairs onto concrete, trauma team leader Richard Hall fears the worst.
A man is attacked by a gang of robbers attempting to steal his phone, leaving him badly injured. Mark and Tom witness an accident when a motorcyclist and pillion rider come off a bike.
Dr Dev Shah treats a Nottingham Forest fan with a large head cyst, and Dr Toby Nelson deals with a series of mini lipomas that look like a string of pearls.
Documentary series. A furious landlord discovers his tenant has been sub-letting his London flat, and squatters with a baby are given two weeks to find somewhere new to live.
Documentary series. Documentary series. Anthony comes to the aid of Max, a rather rotund Rottweiler who has been cooped up indoors by owners who are banned from keeping animals.
Documentary series. Fabielli and her family have been forced into one room due to leaks in the roof, but the landlord refuses to make any repairs.
Documentary series. Dr Watson offers 'talking therapy' to a young lady who recently lost her mother and Dr Bower treats a gentleman who is plagued by suicidal thoughts.
The "Pedigree Chums" are determined to out-quiz the Eggheads.

Documentary series. Squatters in Tottenham invade an elderly woman's home while she is away. Eight unsafe buildings have been built on space allotted to just one.
